chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. Bail. Appl. No.2720 of 2024 Date Order with signature of the Judge 15.01.2025 Mr. Waqar Ahmed Baloch, advocate for applicant. Ms. Rubina Qadir, DPG. a/w SI Sharafat Ali I.O. O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: Applicant Ali Hyder @ Ali is seeking post arrest bail in Crime No.352/2024 U/s 353, 324, 34 PPC of P.S. Pak Colony, Karachi. 2. As per FIR, on a tip off, applicant alongwith three other co-accused was arrested from Kala gate near Nadi Kinara old Golimar, Karachi after an alleged encounter in which three of the accused including applicant were injured. Allegedly, from him, 58 grams of crystal and one unlicensed 30 bore pistol were recovered. He and other co-accused hence were booked in three different cases. 3. Learned counsel in defence has argued that applicability of section 324 PPC is yet to be determined at trial as none from police party received any injured. His arguments have been rebutted by learned DPG. Notwithstanding in this case applicability of section 324 PPC requires further inquiry as only the accused were injured and none of the member of police party or police mobile received any bullet mark/injury. Insofar as recovery of an unlicensed pistol and 58 grams of crystal, separate cases have been registered against applicant. 4. Accordingly, this application is allowed and applicant is granted bail subject to furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.100,000/- and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the trial court. The bail application is disposed of. J U D G E A.K
